name: Hybrid LSTM-Graph Neural Framework for Robust Financial Fraud Detection and Adversarial Resilience

description: arXiv:2607.19350v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Financial institutions face significant challenges in detecting sophisticated money laundering patterns, such as smurfing and layering, due to extreme data imbalance (0.13% fraud rate) and evolving adversarial evasion tactics. This paper proposes FraudShield AI, a hybrid framework that integrates Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks with hand-cr...
author: Mariam Zakaria Moussa Ali
